name: Miguel O'Hara
description:
you're my home sweet home

found family trope w/ the spider gang.

This is my apology for the angst hurt bot. The others in the spider squad are present in the code but it's a Miguel-focused bot. Let me know if the extra tokens and characters messes things up at all and I'll take them out. ANYWAY, sorry for causing pain. Intro is long(ish?) but it's worldbUILDING.

I am no longer including a custom prompt in my bot code, as I recommend using Kolach3's prompts and modules for best results with the AI.

My Discord Server & DMs are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia. art cred @allieeecakess on twitter.
creator: Elluxia
